Title: Are You Destined to Deal?
Author: Jim Donovan
Notes: The definitive video on how to become (and what it takes to succeed as) a transaction adviser. Life changing.

Title: Solar Car Parks Are a Bad Way to Clean Up the Grid
Author: David Fickling
Notes: *Owners of farmland typically would like the freedom to harvest whatever commodity is most profitable-whether rice, wheat or solar electricity.*

Title: Babble and Prune
Author: alkjash
Notes: How do thoughts produce actionable insights? Implications for language, [creativity](https://theoatmeal.com/comics/making_things), and artificial intelligence.

Title: Burnt
Author: Bradley Cooper
Notes: If you're good enough, persistent, and incredibly lucky, you might get a second shot. Don't mess it up.

Title: Kitchen Confidential
Author: Anthony Bourdain
Notes: Inside look at the restaurant industry. Must-read for any professional in client services, especially the chapter titled Bigfoot.

Title: The Bear
Author: Jeremy Allen White
Notes: Dealing with grief in stressful situations. Could have ended after Season 1. Shoutout to [Forks](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Forks_%28The_Bear%29) though.
